info.title: Farm Management API
info.description: API documentation for the Farm Management System. All responses are wrapped in a GenericResponse object with fields: timestamp (string, date-time), status (string), message (string), and optional data (object).

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Endpoints for user authentication and registration

tags.name: Machine Learning Predictions
tags.description: Endpoints for machine learning-based predictions for crop recommendation, pump operation, and fertilizer selection

tags.name: Admin Management
tags.description: Endpoints for managing admin roles and permissions

tags.name: Image Management
tags.description: Endpoints for managing images associated with entities

get.description: Retrieves a specific user by their ID. Accessible by admins and the user themselves.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the user to retrieve

put.description: Updates an existing user by their ID with new details. Accessible by admins and the user themselves.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the user to update

delete.description: Deletes a user by their ID. Accessible by admins only.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the user to delete

get.description: Retrieves a specific review by its ID. Accessible by admins and the review owner.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the review to retrieve

put.description: Updates an existing review by its ID. Accessible by admins and the review owner.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the review to update

delete.description: Deletes a review by its ID. Accessible by admins and the review owner.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the review to delete

get.description: Retrieves a specific product by its ID. Accessible by admins, users, and farmers.

put.description: Updates an existing product by its ID with new details. Accessible by admins and farmers.

delete.description: Deletes a product by its ID. Accessible by admins and farmers.

delete.description: Deletes a payment by its ID. Accessible by admins only.

parameters.description: ID of the payment to delete

put.description: Updates the status of an existing order by its ID. Accessible by admins only.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the order to update

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: New status of the order (e.g., PENDING, PAID)

put.description: Cancels an existing order by its ID. Accessible by admins and users.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the order to cancel

get.description: Retrieves a specific image by its ID. Accessible by admins, users, and farmers.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the image to retrieve

put.description: Updates an existing image by its ID with a new file. Accessible by admins and farmers.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the image to update

parameters.name: entityType
parameters.description: Type of entity the image is associated with (e.g., USER, PRODUCT)

parameters.name: entityId
parameters.description: ID of the entity the image is associated with

delete.description: Deletes an image by its ID. Accessible by admins and farmers.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the image to delete

get.description: Retrieves a specific farmer by their ID. Accessible by admins and the farmer themselves.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the farmer to retrieve

put.description: Updates an existing farmer by their ID. Accessible by admins and the farmer themselves.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the farmer to update

delete.description: Deletes a farmer by their ID. Accessible by admins and the farmer themselves.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the farmer to delete

get.description: Retrieves a specific category by its ID. Accessible by admins, users, and farmers.

parameters.description: ID of the category to retrieve

put.description: Updates an existing category by its ID. Accessible by admins only.

delete.description: Deletes a category by its ID. Accessible by admins only.

get.description: Retrieves a specific cart by its ID. Accessible by admins and the cart owner.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the cart to retrieve

put.description: Updates an existing cart by its ID. Accessible by admins and the cart owner.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the cart to update

delete.description: Deletes a cart by its ID. Accessible by admins and the cart owner.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the cart to delete

put.description: Updates the quantity of a specific item in a cart by cart ID and product ID. Accessible by admins and the cart owner.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the cart containing the item

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to update

delete.description: Removes a specific item from a cart by cart ID and product ID. Accessible by admins and the cart owner.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the cart to remove the item from

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to remove

put.description: Increases the quantity of a specific item in a cart by a specified amount (default is 1). Accessible by admins and the cart owner.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the cart containing the item

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to increase quantity for

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount to increase the quantity by (default is 1)

put.description: Decreases the quantity of a specific item in a cart by a specified amount (default is 1). Accessible by admins and the cart owner.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the cart containing the item

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to decrease quantity for

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount to decrease the quantity by (default is 1)

get.description: Retrieves a specific address by its ID. Accessible by admins and the address owner.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the address to retrieve

put.description: Updates an existing address by its ID. Accessible by admins and the address owner.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the address to update

delete.description: Deletes an address by its ID. Accessible by admins and the address owner.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the address to delete

post.description: Searches users with pagination based on name, email, and phone number. Accessible by admins only.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the user to filter by (optional)

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Email of the user to filter by (optional)

parameters.name: phone
parameters.description: Phone number of the user to filter by (optional)

post.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all users in the system. Accessible by admins only.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all reviews in the system. Accessible by admins only.

post.description: Creates a new review for a product. Accessible by admins and users.
Retrieves a paginated list of reviews submitted by a specific user by user ID. Accessible by admins and the user.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: ID of the user whose reviews are to be retrieved

post.description: Searches reviews with pagination based on product ID, user ID, rating range, and comment content. Accessible by admins and users.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to filter by (optional)

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: ID of the user to filter by (optional)

parameters.name: minRating
parameters.description: Minimum rating to filter by (optional)

parameters.name: maxRating
parameters.description: Maximum rating to filter by (optional)

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment content to filter by (partial match, optional)

post.description: Retrieves a paginated list of reviews for a specific product by product ID. Accessible by admins and farmers.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to retrieve reviews for

post.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all reviews in the system. Accessible by admins only.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all products in the system. Accessible by admins, users, and farmers.

post.description: Creates a new product with the provided details. Accessible by admins and farmers.
Searches products with pagination based on name, category ID, farmer ID, availability, unit, and price range. Accessible by admins, users, and farmers.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the product to filter by (optional)

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: ID of the category to filter by (optional)

parameters.name: farmerId
parameters.description: ID of the farmer to filter by (optional)

parameters.name: available
parameters.description: Availability status to filter by (true/false, optional)

parameters.name: unit
parameters.description: Unit of the product to filter by (optional)

parameters.name: priceMin
parameters.description: Minimum price to filter by (optional)

parameters.name: priceMax
parameters.description: Maximum price to filter by (optional)

post.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all products in the system. Accessible by admins, users, and farmers.
Retrieves a paginated list of products created by a specific farmer by farmer ID. Accessible by admins and the farmer.

parameters.name: farmerId
parameters.description: ID of the farmer to retrieve products for

post.description: Retrieves a paginated list of products belonging to a specific category by category ID. Accessible by admins, users, and farmers.

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: ID of the category to retrieve products for

post.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all available products (quantity > 0 and marked as available). Accessible by admins, users, and farmers.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all payments in the system. Accessible by admins only.

post.description: Creates a new payment with the provided details. Accessible by admins and users.
Retrieves a paginated list of payments with a specific status (e.g., COMPLETED, PENDING). Accessible by admins only.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Status of the payments to filter by (e.g., COMPLETED, PENDING)

post.description: Searches payments with pagination based on status, payment method, and amount range. Accessible by admins only.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Status of the payments to filter by (e.g., COMPLETED, PENDING, optional)

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: Payment method to filter by (e.g., CREDIT_CARD, PAYPAL, optional)

parameters.name: minAmount
parameters.description: Minimum amount to filter by (optional)

parameters.name: maxAmount
parameters.description: Maximum amount to filter by (optional)

post.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all payments in the system. Accessible by admins only.
Retrieves a paginated list of payments made using a specific payment method (e.g., CREDIT_CARD, PAYPAL). Accessible by admins only.

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: Payment method to filter by (e.g., CREDIT_CARD, PAYPAL)

get.description: Retrieves a list of all orders in the system. Accessible by admins only.

post.description: Creates a new order with the provided details. Accessible by admins and users.
Reorders a previous order by its ID. Accessible by admins and users.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the order to reorder

post.description: Retrieves a paginated list of orders associated with a specific user ID. Accessible by admins and the user.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: ID of the user whose orders are to be retrieved

post.description: Searches orders with pagination based on user ID, date range, status, and total price range. Accessible by admins and users.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: ID of the user to filter by (optional)

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: Start date and time to filter by (ISO format, optional)

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: End date and time to filter by (ISO format, optional)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Status of the order to filter by (e.g., PENDING, PAID, optional)

parameters.name: minTotalPrice
parameters.description: Minimum total price to filter by (optional)

parameters.name: maxTotalPrice
parameters.description: Maximum total price to filter by (optional)

post.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all orders in the system. Accessible by admins only.
Places a new order using the items in a specific cart by cart ID. Accessible by admins and users.

parameters.name: cartId
parameters.description: ID of the cart to place the order from

post.description: Uses ML Model 7 to predict the best fertilizer based on input parameters like soil nutrients and crop type. Accessible by admins and farmers.
Uses ML Model 6 to predict whether a pump should be turned on based on input parameters like soil moisture and weather. Accessible by admins and farmers.
Uses ML Model 5 to predict the best crop based on input parameters like soil and weather conditions. Accessible by admins and farmers.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all images in the system. Accessible by admins only.

post.description: Uploads a new image associated with an entity (e.g., user, product). Accessible by admins and farmers.

parameters.name: entityType
parameters.description: Type of entity the image is associated with (e.g., USER, PRODUCT)

parameters.name: entityId
parameters.description: ID of the entity the image is associated with

post.description: Searches images with pagination based on entity type, entity ID, file type, size range, and file name. Accessible by admins only.

parameters.name: entityType
parameters.description: Type of entity (e.g., USER, PRODUCT) to filter by (optional)

parameters.name: entityId
parameters.description: ID of the entity to filter by (optional)

parameters.name: fileType
parameters.description: Type of file (e.g., JPEG, PNG) to filter by (optional)

parameters.name: minSize
parameters.description: Minimum size of the image in bytes (optional)

parameters.name: maxSize
parameters.description: Maximum size of the image in bytes (optional)

parameters.name: fileName
parameters.description: Name of the file to filter by (optional)

post.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all images in the system. Accessible by admins only.
Retrieves a paginated list of images associated with a specific entity by entity type and ID. Accessible by admins, users, and farmers.

parameters.name: entityType
parameters.description: Type of entity (e.g., USER, PRODUCT)

parameters.name: entityId
parameters.description: ID of the entity

get.description: Retrieves a list of all farmers in the system. Accessible by admins only.

post.description: Creates a new farmer profile. Accessible by admins and users.
Searches farmers with pagination based on farm name, farm type, location description, and government ID. Accessible by admins only.

parameters.name: farmName
parameters.description: Name of the farm to filter by (optional)

parameters.name: farmType
parameters.description: Type of the farm to filter by (optional)

parameters.name: locationDiscription
parameters.description: Location description of the farm to filter by (optional)

parameters.name: governmentId
parameters.description: Government ID of the farmer to filter by (optional)

post.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all farmers in the system. Accessible by admins only.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all categories in the system. Accessible by admins, users, and farmers.

post.description: Creates a new category. Accessible by admins only.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the category to filter by (optional)

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description of the category to filter by (optional)

post.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all categories in the system. Accessible by admins, users, and farmers.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all carts in the system. Accessible by admins only.

post.description: Creates a new cart for a user. Accessible by admins and users.
Adds an item to a specific cart by its ID. Accessible by admins and the cart owner.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the cart to add the item to

post.description: Searches for items in a specific cart with pagination, by cart ID, with optional filters for product name and minimum quantity. Accessible by admins and the cart owner.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the cart to search items in

parameters.name: productName
parameters.description: Name of the product to filter by (optional)

parameters.name: minQuantity
parameters.description: Minimum quantity of the product to filter by (optional)

post.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all carts in the system. Accessible by admins only.
Creates a new user account with the provided details. Returns the created user details upon successful registration.
Verifies the user's email address by checking the provided verification code.
Verifies the reset token and sets a new password.
Resends the email verification code to the provided email address.
Authenticates a user with the provided credentials and returns a JWT token or authentication response upon successful login.
Requests a password reset by sending a reset link/token to the user's email.
Changes the user's password. Requires current password and new password.
Requests an email change. Requires new email, password confirmation, and re-verification.
Promotes a user to admin role by their user ID. Accessible by admins only.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: ID of the user to promote to admin

post.description: Toggles the email service on or off. Accessible by admins only.
Demotes a user from admin role by their user ID. Accessible by admins only.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: ID of the user to demote from admin

get.description: Retrieves a list of all addresses in the system. Accessible by admins, users, and farmers.

parameters.description: ID of the user whose addresses are to be retrieved

post.description: Retrieves a paginated list of addresses of the currently authenticated user. Accessible by users and farmers.

parameters.description: Type of the address (e.g., billing, shipping)

parameters.description: ID of the user associated with the address

post.description: Searches addresses of the currently authenticated user with pagination, based on criteria such as pin code, district, street, state, and address type. Accessible by users and farmers.

parameters.name: pinCode
parameters.description: Pin code of the address

parameters.name: district
parameters.description: District of the address

parameters.name: street
parameters.description: Street name of the address

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: State ID of the address

parameters.name: addressType
parameters.description: Type of the address (e.g., billing, shipping)

ImageDTO.description: Data Transfer Object for an image associated with an entity

fileName.description: Original name of the uploaded file

savedName.description: Name under which the file is stored

fileSize.description: Size of the file in bytes

entityType.description: Type of entity associated with the image

entityId.description: ID of the entity associated with the image

isPrimary.description: Indicates if this is the primary image for the entity

rating.description: Rating given in the review (1 to 5)

productId.description: ID of the product being reviewed

userId.description: ID of the user who submitted the review

categoryId.description: ID of the category the product belongs to

unit.description: Unit of measurement for the product quantity

expiryDate.description: Expiry date of the product (must be in the future if provided)

farmerId.description: ID of the farmer who owns the product

images.description: List of images associated with the product

ordersId.description: ID of the order associated with the payment

userId.description: ID of the user associated with the farmer

images.description: List of images associated with the farmer

userId.description: ID of the user associated with the cart

items.description: List of items in the cart

CartItemDTO.description: Details of the cart item to add

productId.description: ID of the product in the cart

quantity.description: Quantity of the product in the cart

pinCode.description: Postal PIN code (must be a 6-digit number)

userId.description: ID of the user associated with this address

ascending.description: Sort direction (true for ascending, false for descending)

OrderItemDTO.description: Request DTO for an item in an order

priceAtPurchase.description: Price of the product at the time of purchase

id.description: Unique identifier for the order (optional for creation, required for update)

userId.description: ID of the user who placed the order

orderDate.description: Date and time when the order was placed (auto-generated if not provided)

totalPrice.description: Total price of the order (auto-calculated if not provided)

items.description: List of items in the order

ML7Dto.description: Input data for Model 7 prediction (e.g., soil NPK levels, crop type)

id.description: Unique identifier for the ML7 data entry

ML6Dto.description: Input data for Model 6 prediction (e.g., soil moisture, rainfall)

id.description: Unique identifier for the ML6 data entry

ML5Dto.description: Input data for Model 5 prediction (e.g., soil pH, temperature)

id.description: Unique identifier for the ML5 data entry

EmailVerificationRequest.description: Email verification details including email and verification code.

email.description: The email address of the user to verify

verificationCode.description: The verification code sent to the email for verification

ResetPasswordRequest.description: Request object to reset password using a verification token

verificationCode.description: The verification code sent to the email for verification

newPassword.description: New password to be set for the account

ResendVerificationRequest.description: The email address to resend the verification code

email.description: The email address of the user to resend the verification code to

ForgotPasswordRequest.description: Request object to initiate a password reset process

email.description: Email address of the user requesting password reset

ChangePasswordRequest.description: Request object for changing user password

currentPassword.description: Current password of the user (used for confirmation)

newPassword.description: New password for the user account

ChangeEmailRequest.description: Request object to change the user's registered email address

currentPassword.description: Current password of the user (required for confirmation before changing email)

newEmail.description: New email address to be linked with the account

BadRequest.description: Bad request due to invalid input
